metadata.ogTitle: Markopolo AI | Customer Engagement Platform for Ecommerce
metadata.description: Markopolo AI is an agent-led CEP for ecommerce, retail & D2C brands. It powers personalized behavioral marketing across 6 channels to boost revenue.
